name: UPEXI, INC.
summary: PART I General Overview As used in this Annual Report and unless otherwise indicated, the terms we, us, our, Upexi, and the Company mean Upexi, Inc., a Delaware corporation, originally formed as a Nevada corporation in September of 2018. The Company has seven active subsidiaries that are part of the Company. DESCRIPTIONOF BUSINESS Our Company We are in the cryptocurrency industry and the management of cash assets through a cryptocurrency portfolio, primarily focused in Solana tokens and staking ...
